title: Sounds of Tamriel
description: Sounds of Tamriel is a pack that aims to change sounds in Minecraft with sounds similar the The Elder Scrolls Skyrim for a more Nordic and medieval feeling. This works with addons, texture packs, shaders, and even on servers. It changes hundreds of sounds
body:
Sounds of Tamriel is a pack that aims to change sounds in Minecraft with sounds similar the The Elder Scrolls Skyrim for a more Nordic and medieval feeling. This works with addons, texture packs, shaders, and even on servers. It changes hundreds of sounds and I will be adding more! All sounds are digitally enchanted high quality & it works great with Dolby Atmos! If you love Skyrim or just want a medieval pack this is perfect for you

This is my pack I made years ago & have been supporting for Bedrock Edition, ported over for Java users. If you want to hear some of the sounds in a video I will provide a link but be warned the video is old and new/more sounds have been added and some sounds I didn't like have been replaced/improved. Enjoy: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vdtvru3GAKw&list=PLm9tO7k6K5K4TFojOuAe37GcgnyLi-zwN&index
